headline: Pfizer’s Weight Management Drug Wins China Approval
summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) is included among the 14 Low PE High Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 6, Reuters reported that China has approved Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE)’s GLP-1 treatment Xianweiying for long-term weight management in overweight or obese adults. Pfizer shared the update on WeChat on March 6. The approval adds new competition […]

headline: How Tilrekimig’s Trispecific Eczema Data At Pfizer (PFE) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In early March 2026, Pfizer reported past Phase 2 trial results showing its investigational trispecific antibody tilrekimig significantly improved eczema severity versus placebo in adults with moderate to severe atopic dermatitis, while maintaining a favorable safety profile. By targeting three key Type 2 inflammation drivers (IL-4, IL-13, and TSLP) with once-monthly dosing, tilrekimig could meaningfully reshape Pfizer’s immunology franchise if later-stage trials confirm these early,...
